subjects.description: towering pile of burning autumn leaves
subjects.appearance_details: golden, amber, rust, and brown leaves stacked high, bright orange flames curling through dry edges, gray smoke lifting upward
subjects.relationship: primary fiery subject within the ancient forest clearing
subjects.location: on the leaf-covered forest floor near the center foreground
subjects.relative_size: large pile rising above the surrounding fallen leaves but smaller than the nearby trees
subjects.orientation: vertical flame movement rising from a rounded mound
subjects.pose: stationary pile with active flickering fire
subjects.action: crackles and burns as smoke drifts into the cool forest air
subjects.state_changes: flames brighten and shift, leaf edges curl darker, smoke thickens slightly then thins as it rises
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dry brittle leaf surfaces with glowing ember edges and smoky ash patches

subjects.appearance_details: tall dark trunk, wide branching crown, rugged bark, partly obscured by smoke and warm firelight
subjects.relationship: dramatic background guardian behind the burning leaf pile
subjects.location: deep in the background among dense forest trunks
subjects.relative_size: much taller than the leaf pile and surrounding undergrowth
subjects.action: stands motionless while flickering shadows pass over its trunk
subjects.state_changes: visibility shifts as smoke passes in front of it
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dark rough bark with shadowed leaf canopy

background_setting: A dense ancient forest with tall trunks, a carpet of fallen autumn leaves, and cool air visible through drifting smoke. The burning leaf pile sits in a small clearing, with no people or buildings visible.

lighting.conditions: warm firelight provides the main illumination, casting flickering orange shadows on trees and leaf litter, with dim cool forest light in the background
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: warm firelight provides the main illumination, casting flickering orange shadows on trees and leaf litter, with dim cool forest light in the background

aesthetics.composition: dramatic autumn atmosphere, high contrast fire glow, smoky depth, rustic forest texture, tense but contained mood
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: dramatic autumn atmosphere, high contrast fire glow, smoky depth, rustic forest texture, tense but contained mood

cinematography.camera_motion: low-to-medium cinematic shot, slow push-in toward the fire, shallow smoke layers creating depth, steady handheld feel without sudden movement
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: realistic cinematic text-to-video with natural fire simulation and detailed smoke
artistic_style: moody woodland drama with warm firelight against cool forest shadows
context: The video shows a pile of autumn leaves burning in an isolated forest clearing, emphasizing crackling texture, smoke, and the scale of the old trees around it.

actions.description: The camera frames the burning leaf pile as flames flicker through amber and rust-colored leaves.
Smoke rises and drifts between tree trunks while the fire casts moving shadows across the forest floor.
The distant oak silhouette becomes visible through thinner smoke as the leaf pile continues to crackle.

temporal_caption: A mound of crisp autumn leaves burns in a dense old forest, sending smoke past tall trunks as firelight reveals a distant oak silhouette.
audio_description: crackling dry leaves, soft popping embers, faint breeze through trees, low forest ambience
